description_text:
BPL Oxy 5 Neo Oxygen Concentrator

BPL Oxy 5 Neo Oxygen Concentrator is an affordable oxygen concentrator that supplies oxygen at the flow rate of 0.5-5 LPM at 90-95% oxygen purity.

Weight: BPL oxygen concentrator weighs 25 kgs and comes with wheels for easy transportation within the house.

Sound: The machine produces sound at 55 dB.

Power Consumption: BPL 5 LPM oxygen concentrator consumes around 400 W of electricity.

Operating Altitude: BPL Oxy 5 Neo has an operating altitude of 6000 feet after which the purity level would start to decline.

Flow Meter: BPL 5 LPM comes with a ball-type flow meter with a rotatable knob. The flow rate can be adjusted between 0-5 LPM at an interval of 0.5 LPM.

Outlet Pressure: The machine has an outlet pressure of 7.25 psi. 

Screen-display: The machine comes with a user-friendly screen display that acts as an hour-meter and automatic shutdown timer. 

Alarms: Loss of power alarm and system malfunction

Warranty: BPL 5 LPM oxygen concentrator has a warranty period of 2 years.

Additional Features: This oxygen concentrator comes with an in-built storage facility that is big enough to store all the essential accessories such as cannula tubes, humidifier bottles, extra air filters, user manuals, etc. 

What's in the Box?

Oxygen Concentrator

Nasal cannula

Humidifier Bottle

Nebulizer Bottle

Filter Set

Power cable

User manual
